login.title: Release Tracker
login.subtitle: Manage and track your software releases
login.failed: Login failed, please check username and password

oidc.loginFailed: OIDC login failed, please try again

user.description: Manage your account settings and security options

messages.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
messages.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
messages.passwordUpdateFailed: Failed to update password, please check current password

system.title: System Settings
system.description: Manage global application configuration and integrations

global.title: Global Settings
global.description: These settings apply to the whole application. Future global options should be managed here as well.

baseUrl.title: BASE URL
baseUrl.label: Public app URL
baseUrl.description: Used for reverse proxy deployments, OIDC callbacks, and post-login redirects. Include the full subpath if the app is hosted under one.

timezone.title: Global timezone
timezone.label: System timezone
timezone.description: Executor maintenance windows and statistics charts use this IANA timezone, for example Asia/Shanghai.

logLevel.title: Log level
logLevel.label: Backend log level
logLevel.description: Controls backend application logging after startup.

releaseHistoryRetention.title: Release history retention
releaseHistoryRetention.label: Versions per release channel
releaseHistoryRetention.description: Keep the latest N versions for each release channel. Cleanup runs after executor maintenance windows finish, or daily at 02:00 when no maintenance windows exist.

securityKeys.title: Security keys
securityKeys.description: Manage application-owned session and encryption keys. Raw key values are never displayed.
securityKeys.blocked: Found {{count}} Fernet-looking values that cannot be decrypted with the current key. Fix those records before rotating the encryption key.

jwt.title: Session key
jwt.description: Signs access and refresh tokens. Rotating it immediately invalidates all current sessions.
jwt.rotateDescription: Use a generated secret or provide a strong manual value.
jwt.warning: All users, including you, will be logged out immediately after rotation.

encryption.title: Encryption key
encryption.description: Encrypts credentials, OIDC client secrets, and runtime connection secrets stored in the database.
encryption.rotateDescription: Existing encrypted data will be re-encrypted with the new Fernet key.
encryption.warning: Rotation aborts if any Fernet-looking value cannot be decrypted with the current key.
encryption.rotated: Encryption key rotated. Plaintext values re-encrypted: {{count}}

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Manage version sorting and data fetching preferences
general.versionSortModeDesc: Choose how the system picks the latest version from tracking records
general.fetchLimitDesc: The maximum number of records to fetch per check. Higher limits are useful for projects that release frequently.

oidc.title: OIDC Login Providers
oidc.dialogDesc: Configure an OpenID Connect provider for user login
oidc.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
oidc.secretRequired: Client secret is required when creating a provider
oidc.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Existing users will no longer be able to log in with this provider.

releaseTrend.title: Release Trend
releaseTrend.description: Showing daily release activity for the last 7 days

history.title: Release History
history.description: View and search release history across all trackers.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by version or body content...

aggregate.description: Track one project across child channels and define release channels with regex filters.

validation.atLeastOneSource: Add at least one child channel before saving.
validation.atLeastOneReleaseChannel: Add at least one release channel before saving.
validation.primaryRequired: Choose a primary changelog channel before saving.
validation.primaryMustMatchSource: Primary changelog channel must match one of the tracker child channels.
validation.sourceKeyUnique: Each channel key must be unique.
validation.releaseChannelUnique: Each release channel can only be added once.

identity.title: Tracker identity
identity.description: This tracker represents the project. Child channels provide its releases, packages, charts, or container images.

trackerChannels.title: Tracked channels
trackerChannels.description: Manage the child channels for this tracker.

releaseChannels.title: Release channels
releaseChannels.description: Configure release channels and regex filters for this child channel.
releaseChannels.empty: No release channels are attached to this child channel yet.

fields.name: Release channel type
fields.nameDescription: Choose the release channel type. Labels are localized for stable, prerelease, beta, and canary.
fields.typeDescription: Choose the release status explicitly; it won’t be inferred from the name.
fields.includePatternPlaceholder: Leave empty to include all versions
fields.includePatternDescription: Only versions matching this regex can enter the selected release channel.
fields.excludePatternDescription: Versions matching this regex are blocked even if the include regex matches.

fetching.title: Fetch preferences
fetching.description: These settings apply to the whole tracker.

fields.name: Tracker name
fields.primarySourcePlaceholder: Select the source for canonical release notes
fields.primarySourceDescription: When multiple channels report the same version, release notes come from this child channel.
fields.enabledDescription: Disabled trackers keep their configuration but won’t run scheduled checks.

detail.emptyDescription: Select a tracker to view its child channels, release channels, and version data.
detail.loadFailedDescription: The selected tracker could not be loaded.
detail.releaseChannelsSummary: release channels grouped by child channel
detail.releaseViewsDescription: See how aggregated versions map across child channels.
detail.emptyCanonical: No aggregated versions are available yet.

executors.title: Executor Management
executors.description: Connect tracked versions to your runtime targets.
executors.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this executor?

runtime.title: Add a runtime connection before creating executors
runtime.description: Add a runtime connection before selecting a target.

tracker.title: Add a tracker before creating executors
tracker.description: Executors only automate tracked release channels, so create a tracker first.

both.title: Create the prerequisites before adding executors
both.description: Add a runtime connection and a tracker before creating an executor.

sections.targetSetupDesc: Name the executor and choose a runtime connection before binding.
sections.discoveryDesc: Discover live targets from the selected runtime, then choose one to bind.
sections.targetSelectionDesc: Complete discovery first, then select a target to continue to tracker binding.
sections.bindingDesc: Choose what this executor should follow for the selected target.
sections.bindingStepDesc: Select the source and release channel for this target.
sections.policyDesc: Define when this executor can apply a newly tracked image.
sections.reviewDesc: Confirm the runtime, target, and update policy before saving the executor.

fields.name: Executor name
fields.trackerSourceHint: Choose the image source this executor follows.
fields.trackerSourceSingleHint: This tracker has one available image source, so it is selected automatically.
fields.runtimeConnectionDesc: Used to discover targets and run updates.
fields.runtimeSelectionHint: Choose a runtime connection to discover targets.
fields.trackerFilteredHint: Only trackers with an available image source and release channel are shown.
fields.enabledDesc: Disabled executors stay configured but won’t run on schedule.
fields.globalTimezoneHint: Using the global timezone from System Settings: {{timezone}}.
fields.maintenanceDaysDesc: Leave empty to allow all days. Use the time window below to restrict execution.
fields.channelHint: Only release channels from the selected tracker channel are available here.

modeDescriptions.manual: Only runs when an operator triggers it manually from the list.
modeDescriptions.maintenance_window: Runs automatically, but only inside the configured local maintenance window.
modeDescriptions.immediate: Runs automatically as soon as a newer tracked image is detected.

discovery.runtimeMissing: Select a runtime connection first to enable discovery.
discovery.namespaceHint: Only namespaces configured on the runtime connection are shown; cluster-wide namespace enumeration is not used.
discovery.containerFixedHint: Docker and Podman bind exactly one discovered container.
discovery.dockerComposeHint: Compose projects use the project and selected services.
discovery.portainerStackHint: Portainer stack executors use the stack and selected services.
discovery.kubernetesHint: Kubernetes workloads are bound as one target; choose container bindings in the next step.

binding.targetSelectionRequired: Select a target before choosing its source and release channel.
binding.portainerBindingEmpty: Add at least one service binding before continuing.
binding.serviceBindingGroupHint: Bind multiple services in one compact table.

review.name: Executor
review.ready: The executor configuration is complete and ready to save.

validation.runtimeMismatch: The selected runtime connection and runtime type must match.
validation.trackerSourceRequired: This tracker has multiple image sources. Choose one.
validation.trackerSourceMissing: The selected image source no longer exists. Please choose another one.
validation.trackerSourceUnavailable: The selected image source is unavailable. Please choose another one.
validation.containerTargetRequired: Docker and Podman executors must be bound to one discovered container.
validation.portainerStackTargetRequired: Portainer executors must be bound to one discovered Portainer stack target.
validation.portainerStackTargetIncomplete: Portainer stack targets require endpoint ID, stack ID, stack name, and stack type before the executor can be saved.
validation.serviceBindingRequired: Grouped service executors must define at least one service binding before they can be saved.
validation.serviceSelectionRequired: Each grouped service binding row must choose a service.
validation.duplicateServiceBinding: The same service cannot be bound twice in one executor.
validation.kubernetesSingleContainer: Select a Kubernetes workload target before saving.
validation.helmReleaseTargetRequired: Select a Helm release target before saving.
validation.trackerImageStrategyIncompatible: This strategy requires an image source with an image value. Choose another source or switch image strategy.
validation.maintenanceTimezoneRequired: Timezone is required for maintenance window mode.
validation.maintenanceTimeRequired: Start and end times are required for maintenance window mode.
validation.channelRequired: A release channel binding is required.
validation.channelMissing: The currently bound release channel no longer exists. Please choose a new one.
validation.channelUnavailable: The currently bound release channel is disabled. Please choose a new one.

toasts.runDisabled: This executor is disabled and cannot be run manually.

imageStrategyDescriptions.replace_tag_on_current_image: Keeps the current image name and updates only the version.
imageStrategyDescriptions.use_tracker_image_and_tag: Uses the image name and version from the selected source.

imageReferenceStrategyDescriptions.digest: Uses an immutable image reference when available.

history.title: Execution History
history.description: Review execution history for the selected executor.
history.emptySelection: Select an executor to view its execution history.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search execution history by image or message
history.noResults: No execution history matched the current filters.
history.clearDescription: This deletes all execution history records for the current executor. This action cannot be undone.

runtimeConnections.title: Runtime Connections
runtimeConnections.description: Manage the connections your executors can use.

dialog.description: Add or update a connection for your runtime.

errors.kubeconfigRequiredForNamespaceDiscovery: Select a Kubernetes credential, or enable in-cluster config before discovering namespaces.
errors.kubernetesCredentialRequired: Select a Kubernetes credential, or enable in-cluster config before saving.
errors.portainerCredentialRequired: Select a Portainer credential before saving.

sections.containerDescription: Set the Docker or Podman socket endpoint.
sections.kubernetesDescription: Choose a cluster context and the namespaces this connection can use.
sections.portainerDescription: Connect to Portainer and choose the endpoint this connection should use.
sections.secretDescription: Leave a secret field blank to keep the current saved value for {{type}}.
sections.kubernetesSecrets: Leave secret fields blank to keep the current saved values.
sections.portainerSecrets: Leave the API key blank to keep the current saved value.

fields.name: Connection Name
fields.enabledDescription: Disabled connections cannot be selected for new executors.

hints.socket: Use unix:// for a local socket or tcp:// for a remote socket.
hints.tlsVerify: Enable when the remote daemon requires certificate validation.
hints.namespaces: Discover namespaces from the current cluster and select one or more.
hints.inCluster: When enabled, kubeconfig is optional and the backend uses in-cluster auth.
hints.kubeconfig: Required unless in-cluster config is enabled or a Kubernetes credential is selected.
hints.baseUrl: Must start with http:// or https://.

empty.namespaces: No namespaces loaded yet. Click discover namespaces first.

references.blockedDescription: Remove these references before deleting this credential.

tracker.description: Configure tracker channels, credentials, and release channels.

fields.name: Name
fields.channelNameDesc: Select the display category for this channel
fields.includeRegexDesc: Only include versions matching this regex pattern
fields.excludeRegexDesc: Exclude versions matching this regex pattern
fields.fetchLimitDesc: Can be increased for frequently released repositories (max 100).
fields.fetchTimeoutDesc: Maximum waiting time for fetching remote data (max 180s).
fields.sortModeSemVer: Sort by Semantic Version (Ignores older security patches)
fields.githubFetchModeDesc: Choose whether GitHub tries GraphQL or REST first.
fields.fallbackTagsDesc: Retry with raw Git tags when no releases are returned

credential.description: Store tokens and connection authentication materials securely.

hints.trackerAuthentication: Tracker credentials store API tokens for source providers.
hints.connectionAuthentication: Connection credentials store reusable authentication materials.

timezone.title: Global timezone
timezone.label: System timezone
timezone.description: Executor maintenance windows use this IANA timezone, for example Asia/Shanghai.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure webhooks to receive release update notifications

dialog.name: Name
dialog.languageDesc: Controls the language used in webhook message fields and test messages.
dialog.eventsDesc: Select event types to trigger notifications
dialog.description: Configure the details for your notification channel.

eventDescriptions.new_release: Triggered when a new version is detected
eventDescriptions.republish: Triggered when a version is republished
eventDescriptions.executor_run_success: Triggered when an executor updates its runtime target successfully
eventDescriptions.executor_run_failed: Triggered when an executor run fails
eventDescriptions.executor_run_skipped: Triggered when an executor run is skipped
